content:
cron.umbe.me Technical blog on DevOps/Cloud, Backend/API and Pimcore — published automatically twice a week in both Italian and English.
How it works Every Monday and Thursday a GitHub Actions workflow triggers a multi-agent AI pipeline:
🎯 TopicAgent → picks topic, avoids repetition ✍️ WriterAgent → writes 2000+ word article (IT + EN) ✏️ EditorAgent → reviews technical accuracy 🔍 SEOAgent → optimizes title, description, tags 🖼️ ImageAgent → generates SVG cover 🚀 Deploy → Hugo build → GitHub Pages No human editors. No manual publishing. Just code and Claude.
Stack Hugo + Minima theme GitHub Actions for scheduling and CI/CD Claude API (Anthropic) for content generation GitHub Pages for hosting Author Made by quincia.
summary:
cron.umbe.me

Technical blog on DevOps/Cloud, Backend/API and Pimcore — published automatically twice a week in both Italian and English.

How it works

Every Monday and Thursday a GitHub Actions workflow triggers a multi-agent AI pipeline:

🎯 TopicAgent  →  picks topic, avoids repetition
✍️  WriterAgent  →  writes 2000+ word article (IT + EN)
✏️  EditorAgent  →  reviews technical accuracy
🔍 SEOAgent    →  optimizes title, description, tags
🖼️  ImageAgent  →  generates SVG cover
🚀 Deploy      →  Hugo build → GitHub Pages

No human editors. No manual publishing. Just code and Claude.
title: About
